reviews.comment:
El parador del ACA que quedó tapado por la autovía 2, pero mantiene una gran atención a los socios

(Translated by Google)
The ACA rest stop, which was covered over by Highway 2, but maintains great attention to its members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxeE9lSVRREAE

reviews.comment:
Está muy bueno que vendan conservas raras para llevarte tipo ciervo o vizcacha, los precios son igual que en cualquier estación de servicio de la ruta, las opciones para comer es básica al igual que para tomar, tenían un par de yogures por lo menos.

(Translated by Google)
It's great that they sell rare canned goods to take home, like deer or vizcacha. The prices are the same as at any service station along the route. The food options are basic, as are the drinks. They had at least a couple of yogurts.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxc0ppb2RREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención de todos los mozos!!...la comida muy buena siempre!...las mejores palmeras!...pero lastima que sean tan poco democráticos...a la hora de la asunción del presidente ...pusieron tenis!...lamentable

(Translated by Google)
The service from all the waiters was excellent!!...the food was always very good!...the best palmier pastries!...but it's a shame they're so undemocratic...at the time of the president's inauguration...they put on tennis shoes!...disgraceful
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWOE1mQzRBRRAB
